name: societymart-monorepo
description: Premium full-stack monorepo control orchestrator for SocietyMart

scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix "[{name}]" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,yellow" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:admin" "npm run start:frontend"
scripts.install:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm install --prefix SocietyMart-Backend" "npm install --prefix SocietyMart-Admin" "npm install --prefix SocietyMart"
